title: citrus glauca
intro: Citrus glauca, also known as the desert lime, is a small evergreen tree native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Citrus glauca include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Citrus glauca can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, juice, and oil, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
